reviews.author: CÉCILE NGUYỄN
reviews.text: A very beautiful place you should visit once. You can watch a very nice sunset at lakeside. Sometimes you can see the fishing boats pass by with full of net for catching fish at night and back to market in the early morning.You can use Stand Up Paddle to feel wonderful with the water and the sky here. The color of water and sky are the same at sunset time. Go and stop here to enjoy the natural scenery like a painting at Ấp Bến Nôm 2, Xã Phú Cường, Huyện Định Quán, Đồng Nai, where Tri An lake is very famous.

reviews.author: Kian Nguyen
reviews.text: I love it. This place is super nice that my friends visit there as monthly basic. For me, to be honest, it is the best place in Dong Nai province to take pictures for your wedding.Try it out. Highly recommended and well deserved 5 stars.

reviews.author: Thuy Doan
reviews.text: Great experience to get to the location as shown on google map (it's not the usual spot that people go to for camping, much more further toward Phu Ly ). We have to drive around 44km through a beautiful road of the jungle with tree on the sides, the ride seem thrilling for us since we drive close to the night and it's about to rain but totally worth it. :D

reviews.author: Mark Jelen
reviews.text: A very beautiful Tri An lake. Very peaceful and relaxing. A great place to be!

reviews.author: Jube Jubin
reviews.text: Beautiful lake.. Also feeding a hydroelectric station. Then dirt roads leading to Ma Da jungle

reviews.author: Hoang Le
reviews.text: Always a special place. Not too far from saigon but you will get to enjoy the rural & wilderness

reviews.author: Diem Nguyen
reviews.text: Nice views, ideal place for camping.

reviews.author: Phuc Thao Nguyen
reviews.text: Nice place for selfie and camping.

reviews.author: Rathindra Das
reviews.text: The lake is pretty Tranquil and the island is fun if you are looking for overnight stay. During the day it can get very crowded and noisy. But, the evenings are serene.

reviews.author: Michael Cranston
reviews.text: Filming Location by Kirameki Powers 1990's & Gozyuger Season 49th

reviews.author: Ha VuHoang
reviews.text: The air here is really fresh, you can invite friend come for camping, rowing here, however this place at weekend will be crowded a bit cause this point is quite popular.

reviews.author: Garcia Williams
reviews.text: Nice place nearest Saigon (about 65-85km) you can take your family to relax on Weekend.

reviews.author: Noabidingself
reviews.text: A huge lake, the road around it is worth sight seeing, about 2hr driving from HCM or 1.5hr riding by motobike.

reviews.author: Kai Hai
reviews.text: Great place for kids within 2hours from hcmc. Vietnam Fly Fishing Oi

reviews.author: Trần Hảo
reviews.text: Beautiful, large lake. Awesome place to see the sundown

reviews.author: Heo Ami
reviews.text: You will find out that you were camping on a moutain of trash.

reviews.author: Cong Pham
reviews.text: Good place for camping or outside parties

reviews.author: Sai Patnaik
reviews.text: Closest place to nature. Pure and refreshing

reviews.author: BALO BALO
reviews.text: Very nice place for living and relaxing.
